Quantum of Solace (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $169,368,427Details
International Box Office $422,323,651
Worldwide Box Office $591,692,078
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $50,900,542
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,921,081
Total $58,821,623
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$67,528,882 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$230,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,451 opening theaters/3,501 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $281,862,050

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 14th, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: March 11th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 25th, 2022 (Limited), released as Quantum of Solace (Re: 2022) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: March 24th, 2009 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, and some sexual content
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: James Bond
Geographical setting: England, London
Plot point: Assassination, Betrayal, Secret Agent, Shadowy Organization, Terrorism
Release detail: Disrupted by 2007/2008 WGA Strike
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 2000s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Eon Productions, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
